meaning: n.<口>演奏(或喜爱)古典音乐的人,(不切实际的)文人,(嬉皮士之类)留长发者,长毛猫adj.知识分子的
examples: She's sitting high with her eyes closed, skin still wet from the shower, and her longhair behind her back.
I have a round face, longhair and two big eyes.
If you are longhair, use the benefit of your coat and tail.
"Tips" is an institution here: The House that Professor Longhair Built.
